currentAQI.title: Current Air Quality Index
currentAQI.description: The current AQI stands at 182, categorized as 'Poor'. Fine particulate matter (PM2.5) is the dominant pollutant at 128 µg/m³, significantly exceeding the WHO recommended limit of 15 µg/m³.

forecast.title: 24-Hour AQI Forecast
forecast.description: AQI is expected to peak at 195 around 6 PM due to evening traffic congestion and reduced wind speeds. A gradual improvement is expected post-midnight as traffic subsides.

analysis.title: AI Pollution Analysis
analysis.description: Multi-factor analysis indicates that 38% of current pollution is attributed to vehicular emissions, followed by construction activity (24%) and industrial sources (18%). Temperature inversions and low wind speeds are exacerbating pollutant accumulation.

municipal.title: Municipal Action Items
municipal.description: Based on AI analysis, the following priority actions are recommended for immediate implementation by city authorities.
actions: Restrict heavy vehicle movement during 6AM-10AM and 4PM-8PM
Deploy water tankers on major roads near construction zones
Conduct surprise inspections of active construction sites
Increase public transport frequency during peak hours

health.title: Citizen Health Advisory
health.description: Current air quality poses significant health risks. All citizens are advised to take precautionary measures.
advisories: Avoid outdoor exercise and physical activities
Keep children and elderly indoors during peak hours
